segments.text: Then again I lifted up my eyes and saw, and behold, a flying scroll.
He said to me,
What do you see?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I answered,
I see a flying scroll; its length is twenty cubits, [^4] and its width ten cubits.
segments.speaker: Unknown

footnotes.text: + 1 ephah is about 22 liters or about 2/3 of a bushel

segments.text: Then he said to me,

This is the curse that goes out over the surface of the whole land, for everyone who steals shall be cut off according to it on the one side; and everyone who swears falsely shall be cut off according to it on the other side.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I will cause it to go out,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh of Armies,

and it will enter into the house of the thief, and into the house of him who swears falsely by my name; and it will remain in the middle of his house, and will destroy it with its timber and its stones.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Then the angel who talked with me came forward and said to me,
Lift up now your eyes and see what this is that is appearing.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: I said,
What is it?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He said,
This is the ephah[^5] basket that is appearing.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He said moreover,
This is their appearance in all the land—
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and behold, a lead cover weighing one talent[^6] was lifted up—and there was a woman sitting in the middle of the ephah[^7] basket.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He said,
This is Wickedness;
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and he threw her down into the middle of the ephah basket; and he threw the lead weight on its mouth.

Then I lifted up my eyes and saw, and behold, there were two women; and the wind was in their wings. Now they had wings like the wings of a stork, and they lifted up the ephah basket between earth and the sky.
Then I said to the angel who talked with me,
Where are these carrying the ephah basket?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He said to me,
To build her a house in the land of Shinar. When it is prepared, she will be set there in her own place.
segments.speaker: Unknown
